prompt: In src/lib.rs, add a public function mul(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 that multiplies a and b. Do not change add or greet. Save the file.
Find where the app prints its version and change the string from "version 1" to "version 2". Only edit what is needed.
Read README.md. Create a new file FOUND.txt containing only the secret token found in the README (the word after Token:) and a trailing newline.
